title: Slide
overview: Susan, Leslie, Imani, Deidre, and Elaine have been best friends since college, have an unbreakable bond, and won't allow anyone to penetrate their circle. They share secrets and keep each others indiscretion on the hush. They also share a lavish house they call "The Playhouse" where they entertain their side flings. When one night at the Playhouse turns deadly, the ladies scramble to cover up the crime and keep The Playhouse their secret domain.
